ratings.comment: If you didn't understand everything that was happening in Interstellar, then you won't pass this class. Thought it would be intro level information on the universe and turned out to be super science heavy and very deep information I was not prepared for. Get ready to read a lot in the textbook and expect difficult multiple choice exams.

I thought he was a good professor, tests are fair, and he likes to crack jokes.  At the end of each lecture he'll have at least one question that will be on the test and gives the answer.  If you make every lecture that's around a 1/4 of the questions on the test.
